# Waktu+ - Malaysian Prayer Times & Al-Quran App

> A modern web-based prayer time display for mosques, with Quran and more accessible on mobile. No ads, no signup.

## Overview

Waktu+ is a comprehensive Islamic web application designed for Muslims in Malaysia. It provides accurate prayer times based on JAKIM (Jabatan Kemajuan Islam Malaysia) data, a complete Al-Quran reader, Islamic calendar, and a full-screen mosque display mode.

Website: https://waktuplus.xyz

## Pages

### Home (/)
- Real-time prayer times with countdown to next prayer
- Daily verse from the Quran
- Ramadan countdown (when applicable)
- Automatic zone detection via GPS

### Prayer Times (/prayer-times)
- Monthly prayer timetable for all Malaysian zones
- Full schedule: Imsak, Fajr/Subuh, Sunrise/Syuruk, Dhuhr/Zohor, Asr/Asar, Maghrib, Isha/Isyak
- Zone selector with 46 zones across Malaysia

### Al-Quran (/quran)
- Complete Quran with 114 Surahs and 30 Juz
- Arabic text with transliteration and translation
- Browse by Surah (/quran/surah/[1-114]) or Juz (/quran/juz/[1-30])

### Islamic Calendar (/islamic-calendar)
- Important Islamic dates for 2026 based on JAKIM Malaysia
- Events: Isra Mi'raj, Ramadan, Nuzul al-Quran, Eid al-Fitr, Eid al-Adha, Islamic New Year, Maulidur Rasul

### Waktu+ Display (/display)
- Full-screen display mode designed for mosques and suraus
- Live prayer times with large typography
- Azan alerts and Iqamah countdown
- Friday/Jumaah khutbah alerts
- Customizable title and settings

### Links (/links)
- Quick access page to all Waktu+ features

### Settings (/settings)
- Language toggle: English and Bahasa Malaysia
- Prayer zone selection

## Localization
- Bilingual: English and Bahasa Malaysia
- Localized prayer names, dates, and UI elements
- Islamic date display in Hijri calendar format

## Technical Stack
- Built with Next.js and React
- Progressive Web App (PWA) support
- Responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Zustand for state management

## API Endpoints
- /api/prayer — Prayer times data from JAKIM (waktusolat.app)
- /api/quran — Quran data from alquran.cloud API
- /api/locate — GPS-based prayer zone detection
